zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Aldrich於1477年8月9日出生在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯時，他的父親Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth17歲，母親Lady Alice Yarmouth27歲。他於1498年10月9日與Elizabeth Wood在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國諾福爾可諾維其被列為draper, alderman of norwich。他去世於1529年7月17日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年51歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Aldrich于1477年8月9日出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯时，他的父亲Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth17岁，母亲Lady Alice Yarmouth27岁。他于1498年10月9日与Elizabeth Wood在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国諾福爾可諾維其被列为draper, alderman of norwich。他去世于1529年7月17日在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年51岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Aldrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Aldridge 1, from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich.
History: The earliest recorded bearer of this surname in North America is George Alrich, who came from Derbyshire to MA in 1631.

variants.name: Arledge
meanings: English: variant of   Aldrich   or   Aldridge  . A few bearers of the name are recorded in southern England in the 17th–19th centuries, but the name appears to have died out in Britain.
History: Isaac Arledge died in Fairfield County, SC, in 1790.

variants.name: Aldridge
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich, representing any one of three Old English personal names, Æthelrīc, Ælfrīc, and Ealdrīc, formed respectively from æthel- ‘noble’, ælf ‘elf, sprite’, and (e)ald ‘old, honored’ + rīc ‘ruler’.

habitational name from Aldridge (Staffordshire), Aldridge Grove in Hampden (Buckinghamshire), or from a similarly named unidentified place in the West Midlands, recorded in Domesday Book as Alrewic, from Old English alor ‘alder’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Aldrich was born on 9 August 1477, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth, was 17 and his mother, Lady Alice Yarmouth, was 27. He married Elizabeth Wood on 9 October 1498, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as draper, alderman of norwich in Norwich, Norfolk, England. He died on 17 July 1529, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Aldrich est né le 9 août 1477, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Yarmouth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wood le 9 octobre 1498, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est draper, alderman of norwich à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1529, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Aldrich am 9. August 1477 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth 17 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Yarmouth 27. Er hat am 9. Oktober 1498 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als draper, alderman of norwich in Norwich, Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Juli 1529 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Aldrich è nato il il 9 agosto 1477 nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Yarmouth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wood il 9 ottobre 1498, nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come draper, alderman of norwich nel Norwich, Norfolk, England. Morì il 17 luglio 1529, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Aldrichが1477年8月9日にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスで生まれた時，父Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouthは17歳，母Lady Alice Yarmouthは27歳であった。1498年10月9日にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスでElizabeth Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでの職業はdraper, alderman of norwichと記録されている。彼は1529年7月17日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで51歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Aldrich(이)가 1477년 8월 9일 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Yarmouth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1498년 10월 9일 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 Elizabeth Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 draper, alderman of norwich이었다. 그는 1529년 7월 17일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Aldrich nasceu em 9 de agosto de 1477, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Yarmouth, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wood em 9 de outubro de 1498, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como draper, alderman of norwich em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1529, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Aldrich родился 9 августа 1477 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Aldrich, Bailiff of Yarmouth было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Yarmouth, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wood 9 октября 1498 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии draper, alderman of norwich в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. Он умер 17 июля 1529 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.
